mlb_official.analysis:
🔥 PLAY OF THE DAY

⚾ Los Angeles Dodgers ML
🆚 San Diego Padres @ Los Angeles Dodgers
🕒 Started
Risk Grade: 5

Reason:
Dodgers bring the stronger home profile, hotter recent form, and a clear offensive edge against a Padres starter allowing loud contact.

📈 Value Note:
Model-supported value angle.

━━━━━━━━━━━━

🏆 TOP 2 MONEYLINE

1️⃣ Chicago White Sox ML
🆚 Chicago White Sox @ Cleveland Guardians
🕒 Started
🎯 Confidence Grade: 6/10
Reason: Davis Martin has the cleaner run-prevention profile, while Chicago owns the stronger recent contact and team contact profile edge.

2️⃣ Los Angeles Dodgers ML
🆚 San Diego Padres @ Los Angeles Dodgers
🕒 Started
🎯 Confidence Grade: 6/10
Reason: Dodgers’ offense is in better form, and Randy Vásquez’s contact profile gives Los Angeles the matchup advantage.

━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔥 TOP 2 F5 MONEYLINE

1️⃣ Milwaukee Brewers F5 ML
🆚 Cincinnati Reds @ Milwaukee Brewers
🕒 Started
🎯 Confidence Grade: 6/10
Reason: Jacob Misiorowski has the stronger starter profile with elite strikeout production and run prevention.

2️⃣ Los Angeles Dodgers F5 ML
🆚 San Diego Padres @ Los Angeles Dodgers
🕒 Started
🎯 Confidence Grade: 7/10
Reason: Dodgers have the early-offense edge against Randy Vásquez, whose expected contact metrics are a concern.

━━━━━━━━━━━━

📈 TOP 2 RUNLINE/SPREAD

1️⃣ Seattle Mariners Runline -1.5
🆚 Los Angeles Angels @ Seattle Mariners
🕒 Started
🎯 Confidence Grade: 5/10
Reason: Bryce Miller’s strong WHIP, chase profile, and Seattle’s better recent run differential support separation.

2️⃣ Los Angeles Dodgers Runline +1.5
🆚 San Diego Padres @ Los Angeles Dodgers
🕒 Started
🎯 Confidence Grade: 7/10
Reason: Dodgers are the better-form side and get protection while facing a Padres team that has allowed heavy recent scoring.

━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎯 TOP 2 OVER/UNDER TOTAL RUNS

1️⃣ Under 4.5 (Los Angeles Angels at Seattle Mariners)
🆚 Los Angeles Angels @ Seattle Mariners
🕒 Started
🎯 Confidence Grade: 6/10
Reason: Pitcher-friendly park, cool weather, and two starters with strong expected run-prevention indicators.

2️⃣ No additional qualified play
